transcript.speaker: Rupali
transcript.text: Good morning everyone. Okay so this is go-live week. Payment API is supposed to go live by Wednesday EOD as per the plan. Rakesh, let's start with you — where are we?

transcript.speaker: Rakesh
transcript.text: So API development is done on our side. The code is ready, reviewed, merged. But the staging environment is still pointing to old DB config from last sprint. Vivek was supposed to fix this Friday but I don't think it happened.

transcript.speaker: Vivek
transcript.text: I did fix it on Friday. I updated the config and raised the infra ticket. But central infra team needs to apply it on their end. I followed up Friday evening, no response yet.

transcript.speaker: Rakesh
transcript.text: Okay, so until infra applies it, Ajay's team can't even connect to staging. Is that correct Ajay?

transcript.speaker: Ajay
transcript.text: Yes. We tried connecting Friday afternoon, 3-4 times. Connection timeout every single time. So right now we have zero test coverage on the payment flow. Nothing.

transcript.speaker: Rupali
transcript.text: Vivek can you ping infra right now on Teams? Like right now during this call? We need this today.

transcript.speaker: Vinod
transcript.text: What's the overall situation Rupali. Give me the full picture.

transcript.speaker: Rupali
transcript.text: Sir, staging environment is blocked since Friday — infra config issue. Vivek has done his part, it's with central infra now. We're pushing for resolution by 11am today. Once that's done Ajay can start testing.

transcript.speaker: Vinod
transcript.text: Client called me this morning. They are expecting go-live Wednesday. They've already told their internal team. If we slip that date they will escalate to the BU head. Let's make sure that doesn't happen.

transcript.speaker: Varsha
transcript.text: Rakesh one thing I wanted to flag — the payment gateway sandbox credentials. Client sent them last Tuesday but I realized I haven't verified if we're hitting the correct endpoint. The doc they sent has two URLs and I'm not sure which one is for sandbox.

transcript.speaker: Rakesh
transcript.text: Varsha that needs to be sorted today itself. If we're hitting the wrong endpoint everything will fail even after env is fixed.

transcript.speaker: Varsha
transcript.text: Yes I'll verify. I'll also share the API response schema with Suraj today. She was waiting on it.

transcript.speaker: Suraj
transcript.text: Yes please. I have the payment confirmation page mostly done but I can't finalize the field mapping without the actual response structure. Also there's a small alignment issue on mobile view — I'll fix that today, maybe 2 hours max.

transcript.speaker: Rupali
transcript.text: Okay. So to summarize action items — Vivek follow up with infra, we need env by 11am. Varsha verify gateway endpoint and share schema with Suraj by 12pm. Ajay keep test cases ready so the moment env is up we start running. Suraj fix the mobile alignment.

transcript.speaker: Ajay
transcript.text: 34 test cases are ready. I just need the environment. The moment it's up I'll start.

transcript.speaker: Vivek
transcript.text: Infra guy just replied. He says he'll apply the config by 10:30. I'll confirm once it's done.

transcript.speaker: Vinod
transcript.text: Good. Rupali I want a status message in the group by 12pm — env status, testing started or not, any blockers. Don't wait for tomorrow's standup.
